title: BlockOwner
description: Find out who placed THIS block!
body:
# BlockOwner

To describe the mod in few words. You now know **who** placed **that** block!

# Preview
**BlockOwner Gui**

![GUI](https://i.postimg.cc/cH78zHbT/Base-Profile2025-12-30-01-24-24-01-00-00-05-393-00-00-12-595-ezgif-com-video-to-gif-converter.gif)

<details><summary>specific block search</summary>

  **BlockOwner Tool**
  
  *The default tool is the wooden_hoe*

![Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mastercion/minecraft_mod_fabric_blockowner/a52745b22d01ccf70d060d7c13c87ea1cbb6bcc9/media/gif/preview.gif) 
</details>


## **Commands**:

*This mod requires operator permissions to function and works entirely server-side, so there's no need for any client-side installation or configuration.*
  
  - **`/blockowner gui`**
  
  Opens a Menu where you can view Player placed Blocks and highlight them. **(avaible since v1.0.7)**
  
  - **`/blockowner level [none|minimal|all]`**
  
  Adjusts the log level for the mod, controlling the verbosity of logs.
  - **`/blockowner tool minecraft:item_name`**
  
  Sets the tool used for inspecting blocks. The selected tool is saved in the configuration file for persistent use.
  - **`/blockowner style &1-9{Date} &1-9{Player} &1-9{Block}`**
  
  Allows you to customize the Message of the inspect tool in the way you want it. You can change the order of {Date} {Player} {Block} any way you want and assign minecraft color codes to them.
  - **`/blockowner visualize [playername|clear] range(min10)`**
  
  Allows you to visualize the Blocks placed by the Person with extra info. **(avaible since v1.0.7)**

## All issues and planned stuff here

**Feel free to submit your ideas!**

**To-Do list**: [Open issue Page](https://github.com/mastercion/minecraft_mod_fabric_blockowner/issues/1)

**You can view current known bugs here:**

**Bug list**: [Open issue Page](https://github.com/mastercion/minecraft_mod_fabric_blockowner/issues/3)

## FAQ
### **How does it work?**
It tracks each block placed by every player on the server and stores them on a per-player basis to be later viewed using the selection tool.

### **Will more versions be supported?**
Currently I use this mod on my server, wich runs on this specific version. More versions are on the way but are not the top priority!
